question: tell me an effective way to spare the 10 pin
content:
Use the 3-6-9 system, or for this specific pin you can draw a straight line from the 10 pin passing on the arrows through board 22 all the way to the foul line, that is where the ball should land and that is the cleanest path to hit the ten pin consistently.

stand around board 34 with the right side of your right foot, (that is the spot where the middle of the ball would be if you removed it to the back of your body and simulated your final position at the release moment), open your body and hips and make sure your whole body is facing straight in the direction of the ten pin, aim at board 22 on the arrows, and deliver a straight low rev release, with forward roll. the ball will go directly to the pin. 

If you did hit board 22 but the ball did not finish where you intended, make sure to look down at the foul line to make sure you did not driffted away from the intended line (if you drift too far right, you will not have enough diagonal angle, and if you drift left, you will end up aligned with the gutter before reaching the 10 pin)
